faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

q1.a: Not at all. PortfolioCraft is fully no-code. Just fill in your info, pick a theme, and publish. Your portfolio is live in minutes.

q2.q: Can I use my own domain?
q2.a: Yes — on the Pro and Business plans you can connect any custom domain you own. Just add a CNAME record and you're done.

q3.a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your portfolio stays active until the end of your billing period.

q4.q: What payment methods do you accept?
q4.a: We accept credit cards via Stripe, PayPal, and ShamCash for users in Syria and the region.

q5.a: Your data is stored securely and never shared with third parties. We use industry-standard encryption for all sensitive information.

cta.title: Ready to build yours?
